title: DragonEggBuff
description: A simple minecraft plugin which adds buffs to dragon egg.
body:
**Dragon Egg Buff** is a simple yet powerful Minecraft plugin designed to give special buffs to the **Dragon Egg**. By adding this plugin to your server, the Dragon Egg transforms from a decorative item into a valuable resource that grants players significant combat and survival advantages when held inside inventory. This encourages players to seek out the Dragon Egg as a symbol of power in the game.

### Buffs Provided:
Strength III – Enhances attack damage, giving players a powerful edge in combat.
Absorption II – Grants extra health (hearts), allowing players to survive longer in dangerous situations.
Speed II – Increases movement speed for faster travel across the world.
Resistance II – Reduces incoming damage, making players tougher in battles.
Glowing – Makes players visible in the dark, useful for team play or PvP scenarios.
Regeneration – Gradually restores health over time, keeping players alive through tough encounters.
